acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent mode
alkylation reagent: alkylated using 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylated using 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature
cleavage agent: samples were excised and peptides identified using LC-MS/MS with trypsin digestion
enrichment method: IgM-specific magnetic beads were used to capture antigens
fractionation method: were fractionated on a Mini-PROTEAN TGX Any kD, 7.5%, or 4–20% gels (Bio-Rad) using SDS-PAGE
fragmentation method: were collected and fragmented with collision-induced fragmentation
instrument: interfaced to a ThermoFisher Q Exactive
reduction reagent: were reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol at 60°C
reduction concentration: were reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol at 60°C
